features: SPA with Ghost Vision visualizer (SGA/Fano glyph system)
Live broadcasting via MediaRecorder + WebSocket + ffmpeg
Voice DJ with TTS intros (edge-tts / Windows SAPI)
Dreams page with hallucination timeline and cluster visualization
Flux broadcasting with multi-listener sync and track requests
XSS-protected rendering, command injection hardened, body size limits
securityNotes: FLUX_TOKEN reads from process.env.FLUX_TOKEN with embedded fallback — set env var for production
All exec calls use execFile with argument arrays — no shell injection vectors
POST body size capped at 64KB — prevents memory exhaustion
All innerHTML paths use escapeHtml() — prevents stored XSS from track filenames
Audio files served only from MUSIC_DIR — path traversal blocked by path.resolve check
WebSocket connections are unauthenticated — intended for local / trusted network use
